pendingTasks.title: Mission Control: Theme engine (Light/Dark/Surprise Me + presets)
pendingTasks.notes: Add Slack-style theme panel: Light/Dark toggle, Surprise Me random theme generator, named preset themes, color customizer, save to localStorage. Synthwave84 stays as default.
pendingTasks.result: Theme engine implemented: 8 preset themes (Synthwave84, Daytime Ops, Matrix, Midnight, Red Alert, Deep Sea, Golden Hour, Vaporwave), Light/Dark quick toggles, Surprise Me random picker, custom color editor. Slides in from right as a panel. Persists to localStorage. Files: style.css (theme CSS), theme-engine.js (new), index.html (script tag added).
